Privacy Policy

Last updated: 30 June 2026

1. Introduction

Drylining Edinburgh ("we", "us", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information when you visit our website or use our services.

2. What Data We Collect

We may collect the following types of personal data:

  • Name and contact details (phone, email, address) submitted via our quote form
  • Project details and requirements you share with us
  • Technical data such as IP address, browser type, and device information
  • Usage data via Google Analytics (see Cookies section below)

3. How We Store Your Data

Quote form submissions are securely stored in Google Sheets for our internal use only. We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes.

We retain your data for as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes for which it was collected, or as required by law.

4. Cookies

Our website uses Google Analytics 4 (GA4) to help us understand how visitors interact with our site. GA4 uses cookies and similar technologies to collect data about your visit.

This data is anonymised and helps us improve our website and services. You can manage or disable cookies through your browser settings.

5. Your Rights

Under the UK GDPR, you have the right to:

  • Access the personal data we hold about you
  • Request correction of inaccurate data
  • Request deletion of your data ("right to be forgotten")
  • Object to or restrict processing of your data
  • Request a copy of your data in a portable format

6. Contact Us

To exercise your data rights or if you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:

  • Email: info@dryliningedinburgh.co.uk
  • Phone: FREEPHONE 0800 820 3090
  • Post: Drylining Edinburgh, Edinburgh, UK

7. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.

Drylining Edinburgh

Professional drylining and partition wall contractors serving Edinburgh, Leith, Livingston, Falkirk, Dalkeith, and Musselburgh. CSCS-accredited, fully insured, free quotes.

Services

  • Drylining Contractors
  • Partition Walls
  • Suspended Ceilings
  • Plasterboard Installation

Areas

  • Leith
  • Livingston
  • Falkirk
